name: Zomrage
author: Poki
description: Zomrage throws you into the middle of an epic zombie apocalypse! In this survival game, you'll need to use your smarts to stay alive. Scavenge for cool weapons, discover new items and heal up to keep fighting. Plan your actions carefully to stay one step ahead of the zombie hordes. Can you handle the chaos and prove you’re the ultimate survivor in this zombie-filled world? How do I play Zomrage? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move and attack! You can also use the mouse by clicking on the screen instead. Who created Zomrage? Zomrage is created by 7SpotGames. Play their other games on Poki: BoxRob , BoxRob 2 , BoxRob 3 , Cow Bay , Duo Survival , Duo Survival 2 , Duo Survival 3 , Duo Vikings , Duo Vikings 2 , Duo Vikings 3 , Elixpur Idle , Lands of Blight , Moving Truck , Moving Truck: Bounty , Moving Truck: Construction , Ninja Mouse , Olly the Paw , Truck Loader , Truck Loader 2 , Truck Loader 3 , Truck Loader 4 , Truck Loader 5 , ZomboTag , ZOOM-BE , ZOOM-BE 2 , and ZOOM-BE 3 ! How can I play Zomrage for free? You can play Zomrage for free on Poki. Can I play Zomrage on mobile devices and desktop? Zomrage can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
